response.original_title: Vigilante and Proud: Catching the Street Thieves
response.overview: From pickpocketing to bike theft, phone snatching to shoplifting, street crime is sweeping Britain - and so much of it now captured on our phones. With the police overstretched, there are some areas of the UK where 100% of crimes go unsolved. Communities are forced to take matters into their own hands. Our host, Rebecca Mason, an ex-police detective of more than 10 ye... Read all
